name: Lyzr
oneliner: Lyzr builds on-premise enterprise AI agent infrastructure, letting banks and insurers deploy full agentic systems on their own infrastructure without sending sensitive data to external cloud platforms.
finserv: Accenture led the $14.5M Series A+ specifically to deploy Lyzr in banking, insurance, and financial services clients through Accenture's Project Spotlight accelerator; valuation quintupled to $250M; on-premise architecture directly addresses data sovereignty requirements that block cloud-based platforms from clearing procurement in regulated institutions
team: Founded 2023. Backed by Accenture Ventures (lead), with prior investors from the $8M Series A. Total raised: ~$22.5M+. Accenture's distribution network gives Lyzr a significant GTM advantage into regulated enterprise accounts.
thesis: Lyzr reinforces the thesis that regulated financial institutions will not accept cloud-hosted agent orchestration for sensitive workflows. This gives you a potential partner or component for your on-premise infrastructure offering — specifically the agent runtime and orchestration layer for banks that require data to stay within their own environment.
